## Pull Request Checklist

- [ ] `make lint` passes (black, flake8, isort, mypy, bandit)
- [ ] `make test` passes with coverage >= 70%
- [ ] `bandit -r src/ -ll -ii` returns zero findings
- [ ] `CLAUDE.md` updated if architecture or stack has changed
